_comment: 081 Phase 0: retrospective development SCREENING contract. Frozen BEFORE any probe is run (constitution III). This contract CANNOT issue an ADOPT — see can_adopt=false. Thresholds are deliberately PERMISSIVE: a loose screen costs Phase 1 effort, never a false adoption. Phase 1 adoption thresholds are NOT set here and MUST NOT be relaxed on the basis of Phase 0 output. Do not edit any non-underscore key after the first probe is run; --confirmatory rejects a hash mismatch.

probe._comment: Residual-offset probe (codex): tilt the active OOF race-softmax by exp(gamma . h) and measure the marginal winner-NLL effect. Preserves within-race sum-to-1 (constitution IV) and needs no LightGBM refit.
probe.form: p_prime[i,r] = p[i,r]*exp(gamma . h[i,r]) / sum_j p[j,r]*exp(gamma . h[j,r])
probe.fit_rule: gamma is fitted on strictly-earlier folds only and applied to the strictly-later fold; a gamma fitted on the evaluation fold is contract failure
base_oof_requirements: booster, target encoders, internal calibrator and every as-of feature strictly precede the target race date
ordered feature list and drop list re-attested from the DB active at run time

candidates.expr: [ log(1 + days_since_last), max(0, 14 - days_since_last), max(0, days_since_last - 70) ]

candidates.missing: NaN when horse_number or field_size is null; field_size<2 excluded

timing_separation._comment: constitution II / codex: PRE_ENTRY and POST_WEIGHT candidates are never pooled into one probe result, because a POST_WEIGHT feature is unusable on the pre-weight serving path. Reported as two separate families.

boundary_conventions._comment: Frozen so a failed threshold cannot be re-encoded into a passing one.
boundary_conventions.distance_change: EXCLUDED from this probe (already neutralised by 033 dist_extension/dist_shortening)
boundary_conventions.carried_weight_change: EXCLUDED from this probe (exact difference column already exists)
boundary_conventions.excluded_rationale: codex: an existing exact-difference column removes the re-expression benefit

eval_window._comment: Same development-evidence window as 073 (2008-2026 is development evidence, US4). The DORMANT prospective holdout is untouched.

promotion_to_phase1._comment: DELIBERATELY LOOSE (user decision 2026-07-24). Phase 0 cannot adopt, so a permissive screen only costs Phase 1 effort. Measured race-day cluster SE on this window is ~0.0014-0.0022, so an 80%-power MDE is ~0.0039-0.0062; most feature-scale effects are BELOW it. A strict screen here would reject everything before it could be characterised.

multiplicity._comment: No correction is applied to the screen itself (screening_only, can_adopt=false). Holm-adjusted p-values are computed and reported as DIAGNOSTIC so the selection burden stays visible and is carried into Phase 1 pre-registration.

stopping_rule._comment: Single pass over the fixed candidate list above. Re-running a candidate with a modified encoding, threshold or window is a NEW pre-registration, not a re-run.

subgroups._comment: Reported for diagnosis only. This contract registers NO critical subgroup: with 2026 at ~58 race days in the window the 073 critical set is structurally underpowered (measured 2026-07-24), and gating a screen on it would return NO_DECISION for every candidate regardless of signal.

phase1_handoff._comment: Binding constraint on the NEXT contract, recorded here so it cannot be quietly dropped.
